content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against 88f4f42a39bdb4b0e468b17277f4415f176e31f3 with focus on stable bead-id plan lookup, unconditional membership validation, legacy fallback behavior, and the new lineage/task-source plumbing. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in scope. I also spot-checked the implementation with targeted tests under `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub`, including `resolve_bead_plan_*`, `load_bead_detail_*`, `project_create_from_bead_*` legacy/title-drift cases, and the new lineage/history recovery tests; the sampled tests passed.

## Amendments

None.
